reason: Review checklist — checker re-runs every item (glossary, placeholders, modifiers, tone) against the 113 translated entries.
Canonical-form / idempotency / marker-file safety. Checker must confirm extract --check exit 0 after table edit and that build/warp-zh/ marker is updated post-builder run.
If extract --check fails after the batch, this is the reference for understanding which heuristic/path changed; helps diagnose canonical-form drift.
